string.description: Text value, may be unquoted, single-quoted (literal), or double-quoted (escape processing)

integer.description: Whole number in decimal, hexadecimal, octal, or binary notation

float.description: Floating-point number, infinity, or not-a-number value

boolean.signature: true | false | yes | no | on | off
boolean.description: Boolean value with multiple accepted representations (YAML 1.1 includes yes/no/on/off)

null.description: Null value explicitly with null/~ or implicitly by omitting the value

sequence.description: Ordered collection of values in block or compact flow style

mapping.description: Key-value pairs in block or flow style, keys are usually strings

timestamp.description: Date or date-time value in ISO 8601 format

anchor.description: Named marker for a node that can be referenced elsewhere with *alias

alias.description: Reference to a previously anchored node, enabling reuse without duplication
